revision_summary:
Four targeted fixes required before Stage 3 is production-ready:

1. CODEX REFERENCE FIX (cherry_pick_moments[4]): Replace 'intros.tesla' with 'intros.standard' or a general intro note. Flag lead type as unknown pending metadata. Do not benchmark this intro against the Tesla intro template — there is no evidence this is a Tesla-sourced lead.

2. HYPOTHESIS FLIP (cherry_pick_moments[6], ts 00:41): Revise the 'near-miss near-exit' read. The transcript does not support an accidental self-correction — 'Then I'll contact you' reads as a deliberate acknowledgment of Wahid's stated timeline before a planned pivot. Remove the 'audible hesitation' claim (transcripts carry no audio). Reframe the coaching note as 'make the cross-sell bridge the first response to roof-first deflections' without the dramatic near-exit framing.

3. HANDOFF BRIEF PROMISE CORRECTION (handoff_brief.exact_promises_rep_made[2]): Revise 'Specialist will bring both roof options and the existing solar design' to reflect the rep's actual language — roof options are conditional ('we can definitely see what we can do about getting some roof options put together'), not a firm promise. Solar options are confirmed ready. The closer needs to know the roof options may not be fully prepared.

4. MISSED MOMENTS ADDITION: Add at minimum two cherry_pick_moments entries: (a) ts 00:50 — Wahid's 'I've been shopping around' as a missed competitive-context verify opportunity (no follow-up on prior quotes/designs); (b) ts 02:15 — rep's proactive insurance question as a positive verify/cross-sell behavior that deserves acknowledgment alongside the coaching gaps. The in-person appointment format ambiguity (ts 04:09 closing language 'We'll see you Thursday morning') should also be noted as a second data point supporting the phone-vs-in-person flag already raised in cherry_pick_moments[3].
